src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security configuration from deprecated fluent API to lambda-based DSL to support newer Spring Security versions.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.why_exists: The old fluent API methods like .csrf().disable() and .authorizeRequests().antMatchers() are deprecated or removed in Spring Security 5.7+/6.x, causing compilation errors or runtime warnings that break the build in strict environments.
